brandIdentity: Gaymer millennial aesthetic. Deep cut nerdy lines and dark psychological themes without R-rated gore. Character psychological profiles with problematic tendencies/fatal flaws (selfishness, delusional, jealousy). 'Diva' pop elements appealing to Drag Race fans; sounds like Lady Gaga. Lyrics are sharp, clever, focus on character development (never cliche or sappy). Pop culture references in visual elements/videos.
aestheticRules: Shiny = pink when applicable. Realistic textures paired faithfully with original Pokémon silhouettes, shapes, and proportions (NOT Detective Pikachu style proportions). The real world around them is rendered hyper-realistically.
narrativeRules: Fan fiction / alternate reality metaphors. Complex emotions that elicit viewer responses. Strong understanding of character's psychological motivations before building art.
workflowTools:
Photos: Gemini Pro (base) -> LM Arena (upscale).
Videos: Grok (start frame animation, warps >1 character, free+upscale), Veo 3 (conservative use, 3D transformations), LM Arena (when Grok fails).
Consults: Claude (better Grok prompts), Gemini (deeper brand knowledge).
ultimateGoal: Make the project profitable (driving streaming traffic) while maintaining artistic integrity. Creatively fulfilling, achieving viral videos.
